seo.title: AI UGC Video Generator for Social Promo Campaigns | OpenCreator
seo.description: Create authentic UGC-style promo videos with AI for TikTok, Reels, and paid social. Scale user-generated content formats without full creator production.

hero.title: Sora 2 x UGC Promo
hero.description: Generate creator-style promo videos that look native to social feeds. This workflow helps marketing teams scale UGC formats faster for paid and organic campaigns.

steps.title: Describe your UGC concept
steps.description: Input details about your promotional content, target audience, brand voice, and desired UGC style for authentic social media engagement.

steps.title: Choose Sora 2 style
steps.description: Select from various UGC styles optimized for different social platforms and audience preferences while maintaining authenticity.

steps.title: Generate authentic UGC content
steps.description: Sora 2 AI creates realistic user-generated promotional content with natural poses, authentic settings, and genuine engagement elements.

steps.title: Deploy across social platforms
steps.description: Export high-resolution UGC content ready for Instagram, TikTok, and platforms where authentic content performs best.

items.question: What is the Sora 2 x UGC Promo workflow?
items.answer: Sora 2 x UGC Promo is an AI-powered workflow that creates authentic user-generated promotional content with Sora 2 technology. Generate engaging social media marketing that drives user engagement.

items.question: Who is Sora 2 x UGC Promo designed for?
items.answer: Sora 2 x UGC Promo is essential for social media marketing and UGC content creation: social media managers, content creators, marketing agencies, and e-commerce brands who need authentic UGC content.

items.question: What kind of input do I need to start?
items.answer: You provide details about your promotional content,, target audience,, brand voice,, and desired UGC style for authentic social media engagement.

items.question: What type of output can I expect from this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow generates authentic user-generated promotional content with natural poses, authentic settings, and genuine engagement elements.

items.question: Can I create content for different social platforms?
items.answer: Yes. You can create UGC content optimized for Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and other social media platforms with platform-specific formats.

items.question: How do credits and pricing work for Sora 2 x UGC Promo?
items.answer: Each UGC content generation consumes credits based on the image complexity and customization requirements. The cost is optimized for creating authentic social media content.

items.question: Can I maintain brand consistency across UGC content?
items.answer: Absolutely. The workflow incorporates your brand elements, voice, and visual identity while maintaining authentic UGC aesthetics.

items.question: Is this suitable for product demonstrations and reviews?
items.answer: Yes. Perfect for creating authentic product demonstrations, customer testimonials, and genuine user experiences that build trust.
